query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requestStatus = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requestStatus = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as confirmed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requestStatus = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requestStatus LIKE '%Lost%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requestStatus LIKE '%Deleted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deleted_by_client
FROM jobs;

SELECT requestStatus, COUNT(*) as count FROM jobs GROUP BY requestStatus ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT id, description, requestStatus, locationAddress, artistHourlyRate, dateType, bubbleCreatedAt 
FROM jobs 
WHERE requestStatus IN ('Active', 'Confirmed')
LIMIT 5;
